scripts.slides:extract: node tools/extract-mermaid.js "../vault/Notes/ORAM Software Slides.marp.md" "build/ORAM Software Slides.mermaid.md"
scripts.slides:replace: node tools/replace-mermaid-with-svgs.js "../vault/Notes/ORAM Software Slides.marp.md" "build/ORAM Software Slides.marp.export.md" "../../vault/Attachments"
scripts.slides:finish: npm run slides:rename && npm run slides:replace && npm run slides:pdf
scripts.build-slides: npm run slides:clean && npm run slides:extract && npm run slides:render-mermaid && npm run slides:rename && npm run slides:replace && npm run slides:pdf
